title: hieracium ruebelianum
intro: Hieracium ruebelianum, also known as Rough Hawk's-beard, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion, and it has been used to treat various ailments including wounds, fever, and gastrointestinal issues. Hieracium ruebelianum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used as a raw herb in salads or as a garnish.
